name: skycastle-codex
description: Wires the skycastle secrets-manager MCP daemon into Codex: one HTTP MCP server on port 8210 exposing secret CRUD (get/set/list/delete, versions, tags), KMS, certificates, SSH, secret-scanning, PAM, AI, and token tools, plus an operate skill. Additive — it adds tools alongside Codex's native tooling without replacing anything.
